title: justicia ephemera
intro: Justicia ephemera, also known as the Justicia or Phlox-pink Justicia, is a plant species native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia ephemera include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
